title: Tala Silicone Ladle in Grey Colour, Heat Resistant up to 240 Degrees and Ideal for Serving All Tasks of Sauces and Soups, Ideal to use with Non-Stick cookware, Dishwasher Safe
features: HIGH GRADE SILICONE: This Silicone Serving Ladle is made of high-grade silicone material that is safe for cooking and is BPA Free, It is also heat-resistant up to 210ËšC/410°F, Safe for use with all types of cookware, including non-stick and stainless steel

ERGONOMIC DESIGN: The ladle features an ergonomic design with a comfortable handle that is easy to grip and provides a secure and firm hold. The ladle's head is also designed to hold and pour liquids without spilling or dripping

VERSATILE: The silicone ladle is a versatile kitchen tool that can be used for a variety of tasks, such as stirring and serving soups, stews, sauces, and gravies. It is also great for serving everything from punch to curries
EASY TO STORE: This Silicone Ladle has a hole on the end of the handle that can be used to hang it on a hook for easy storage or wil fit easily in any draw of or on display in a Utensil Pot
FULL RANGE: The Range of Silicone Utencils from Tala can be used for a variety of kitchen tasks, making them Ideal for both home cooks and professional chefs alike
